faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services
faq.badge: Local expertise for the Algerian market

questions.timing: How long does it take to create my website?
questions.payment: What payment methods do you accept in Algeria?
questions.hosting: Do you include hosting and domain name?
questions.modifications: Can I modify my site after delivery?
questions.google: Will my site be visible on Google in Algeria?
questions.satisfaction: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
questions.performance: How can I track my site's performance?

answers.timing: Generally, we deliver your site in 5-7 days depending on project complexity. For a simple showcase site, count 5 days. For a complete online store, 7 days. We keep you informed of progress daily.
answers.payment: We accept all local payment methods: bank transfers, cash payment, CIB, EDAHABIA, CCP, and international payments via PayPal. We adapt to your payment preference.
answers.hosting: Yes! All our plans include one year of fast and secure hosting, plus .com domain registration. No hidden fees, everything is included in the displayed price.
answers.modifications: Absolutely! We provide complete training so you can manage your content. For important technical modifications, we offer ongoing support and updates according to your needs.
answers.google: Yes! We optimize all our sites for local SEO in Algeria. Your site will be optimized to appear in Google searches for Algerian users, with special attention to keywords in French and Arabic.
answers.support: Yes, we offer 24/7 WhatsApp support. You can contact us anytime for any technical questions. We usually respond within an hour.
answers.satisfaction: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied with the result, we fully refund your investment. Your satisfaction is our priority.
answers.mobile: Of course! All our sites are 100% responsive and optimized for all devices: computers, tablets and smartphones. The user experience is perfect on all screens.
answers.features: Yes, we offer extension and maintenance services. You can add new features, integrate additional payment systems, or expand your site according to your business evolution.
answers.performance: We integrate Google Analytics and Google Business into all our sites. You'll receive monthly reports on performance, traffic, and conversions. We explain how to interpret this data.

cta.title: Have other questions?
cta.subtitle: Our team is here to help you. Contact us for a free consultation.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.subtitle: SITEDZ Store - The perfect solution for all your e-commerce needs

privacy.title: Privacy and Data Confidentiality
privacy.description: SITEDZ Store team ensures the confidentiality and privacy of those who have entrusted us with their personal data and customer data. We also protect user connections to your website and enhance its security using HTTPS protocol.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: About 73% of online shoppers say that loading speed is very important in completing the purchase process, so SITEDZ Store platform has been keen to provide a LAZYLOAD system that works on speeding up your website loading in addition to processing your images by reducing size while maintaining quality.

design.title: Design
design.description: Do you want to turn your website visitors into customers and make them spend more time on your site? We provide you with a distinctive type of flexible and modern designs that suit your business field and make your customers enjoy browsing your site.

support.title: Customer Service
support.description: SITEDZ Store considers customer service as its backbone, and for this reason, we have provided you with a team that has the necessary experience and ability to fully meet your expectations.

about.title: Get Your Own Website
about.subtitle: Did you know that you can own an e-commerce website without any programming knowledge? Email, password, and go! Start using your site with SITEDZ Store with just a few clicks without any technical skills or computer science or design expertise.
